_comment: Allowlist for contract-check.ts. Each entry is a (method, normalized-path) tuple the check skips. The 'reason' field MUST link to a tracked issue or document the rationale. Stale entries fail the check, so this list stays honest.

entries.reason: https://github.com/sethbacon/terraform-registry-frontend/issues/275 — frontend calls a backend route that does not exist; resolve by either implementing on the backend or removing the frontend caller.

https://github.com/sethbacon/terraform-registry-backend/issues/343 — route exists on backend (router.go:780) but is missing its @Router swagger annotation. Remove this entry once the backend ships the annotation.

Backend route is registered conditionally under DEV_MODE=true and is intentionally undocumented in production swagger. Permanent allowlist entry.
